settings.label: Disable copying text, downloading images and opening Inspect element
Sale badge text
settings.info: Use [percentage] to display the percentage the customer is saving.

settings.content: Use the cart progress bar for shipping or other cart promotions. The progress bar will show a success message once the cart subtotal reaches the set goal. Make sure to set up an [automatic discount](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/discounts/automatic-discounts).

settings.label: Progress bar goal
settings.info: This should be the required cart sub-total for the promotion.

settings.label: Progress bar message
settings.default: Spend [amount] more to get FREE shipping!
settings.info: Use '[amount]' to display the amount needed to reach the goal.

settings.label: Cart Upsell #1 Product
settings.info: Upsell product will not show if it is already in cart.
